title: Implement /ticks-status recovery and resume flows
description: Implement recovery UX and mechanics for interrupted Pi orchestrator runs. /ticks-status should reconstruct active/recoverable state from tk, branches, worktrees, runner-state notes, and artifacts. /ticks-run should resume existing recoverable work rather than creating duplicate branches. Surface stale leases, orphaned worktrees, partial reports, failed verifications, and awaiting gates.
acceptance_criteria: /ticks-status lists active runs, stale/orphaned worktrees, in-progress ticks, awaiting gates, and last decisions. Resume continues an existing tick branch/worktree when useful work exists and never creates a second branch for the same recoverable tick. Tests cover reconstruction from artifacts + git state.
